reviews.review_description:
Due to hateful/abusive DMs I keep recieving from other users because of my reviews, im now editing my reviews to keep it short, 

Great game and easily could of been the best fishing game on the platform but i think the studio behind it may of shut down? There is one bad bug in the game however, the save function doesn't work half the time (in regards to the star amount) i might bring in a 3star sized fish and quit the game properly but the next time i come on it didn't actually save that, so for a completionist its a really big bug that the devs never got the chance to fix, still a great game but very unfortunate

Love this game!! Even after the game is over you can work to get new reels. I love that you have a fish called bearded Shelly. LoL! I'm hoping you put a multi-player in. I have 8 friends that want to join me and Bait only has 4 seats. Can't move around be still fun. We need another aquarium because there is not enough room to fit all my fishes. Is there any way you can put more things to do in the space ship? Love getting in with fishes in the aquarium. Me and my friends would love to explore the planets even if it's just one scene. Still waiting for the continue, hopefully it IS coming soon. Thank you for this fun game!

The game is a very good time and gives me a much faster paced and arcade-like fishing experience if I'm just wanting to do some quick (and actuallyfun) fishing that isn't me just sitting there idle for 10 minutes straight.
The 4 worlds are all great and everything from the environments to the fishes are well realized. It all looks superb and is a joy to spend time in.
I loved having the missions to complete in every planet as well as catching every fish, but I REALLY wish there was just more of it all. 
A new planet or 2, all with new fishes and missions.
Keep adding paid DLC planet packs or something, because I hate how quickly everything was completed, and I'm sure nearly everyone who played this game would definitely pay more for even more content the same way Real VR Fishing keeps getting new updates and new DLC locations.. 

So 5-Star game, but it is over quickly and is seemingly completely dropped by the developers since last year. Luckily it's fairly priced, just don't hope for more like the rest of us.. 😅

reviews.review_title: Game needs new worlds missions and gear
reviews.review_description: Just finished the game and I like it but I don't like the fact there's only two worlds and so many missions needs more gear and resources too
I literally cried after playing a few minutes of this game.  This is amazing.

reviews.review_title: Way better than Real VR and Bait!
reviews.review_description: If you're looking for an out of this world fishing experience, then this is the game for you. The casting is spot on, the reeling feels smooth, and the fish battles are challenging yet not impossible. Resources that are only found by certain fish make it feel like a fishing RPG with crafting. I remember my first epic fish, the music sounded more intense with varying aspects added into it. I truly felt like I was battling a boss fish. Go grab your tackle boxes and hit the galaxy, people! You won't regret this purchase.
Once you get to Cefir II, the difficulty get harder.

This game is not only extremely fun, but has some of the best graphics I’ve ever seen. Each unique creature has so many details that it must’ve taken years to design. I highly recommend this game for people of all ages who are looking to have a fun time. I especially recommend it to those who appreciate detail.

You tell me! 
   This is a fun foray into fantasy fishing that I really like! The intro even made me laugh out loud, which is a really hard thing to do!! The atmosphere is wonderful, and makes me feel like I'm on a great cartoon adventure one fine Saturday morning!! 
    ( Here comes Grumpy fish )
However. The one feeling I could not shake is how Wonderful this would be to play with my Little Buddy and best pal, but I Can't!! Multiplayer would make this way more fun!! Please!
   The second thing I had some trouble with, but is not a deal breaker, is the Fishing mechanics. I feel they could use just a wee more tweaking. While reeling in, it feels more like Fly fishing than Lure fishing. The actions are on point just need to be tightened up so you don't have to swing your arms so dramatically!
   I feel like if those 2 issues were addressed this game would climb in popularity!
Other than that....
   Get this game, Grab the little kid in yourself, and GO FISHING!!
Whoop,Whoop!

developer_response.body:
Hi ClassyGrandma thanks for the great feedback.  Multiplayer is something we are keen on supporting and always looking for ways to improve our game.  Would love to make sure we address your feedback feel free to join our discord channel discord.gg/galacticcatch
- Galactic Catch Team

reviews.review_description: This game is fun until the very end of it where you have to craft the speerus lure which attracts every fish and after that the mission would still be uncompleted after crafting it so I changed my lure and the speerus lure was GONE and the mission is still incomplete so I can’t even finish the GAME and I hope the galactic catch devs fix this terrible glitch

developer_response.body: Hi TR3Ytac0, we apologize for the issue. We just pushed a fix to address the issues you were experiencing.  If you are continuing to see any issues please reach out to support@baobabstudios.com so we can help you out further.

reviews.review_title: Great game, but needs more levels
reviews.review_description: I'm the type of gamer that it usually takes me weeks if not months to finish a game and this game only took me 2 days. Technically one and a half. The graphics are awesome! The gameplay is fantastic. However, not enough worlds to fish and it would be nice if it had multiplayer achievements a leaderboard. It's just a very tiny game right now, but it's a great tiny game

developer_response.body: Thank you for the review Gidget01.  We are looking to add more features and content including achievements.   Please check back for upcoming announcements.

reviews.review_description: Spectacular work on this game! It's lots of fun and the mechanics are like real fishing. It does give you a great feel of what it would be like fishing off world but the only thing I wish is that you could fish without the meter gage to make it more realistic. That's my only complaint. Highly recommend 👌

developer_response.body: Thanks jaydog69 for the review and the feedback, be on the look out for updates coming soon.

reviews.review_title: Repetitive but still a solid game
reviews.review_description: Repetitive but a solid fishing game.  Worth the price.
My 8 year old grandson loves this game!

developer_response.body:
Thank you etherhaze for the review, glad you and your family are enjoying Galactic Catch!
- Galactic Catch Team

reviews.review_description: I saw Galactic Catch on the Facebook group Total VR Gaming and I was convinced by the coverage they gave it to buy a copy. I'm so glad I did! It's beautiful right from the environments to the gameplay everything feels very professional and highly polished. I love all the tank customisation and the ability to catch so many different varieties of alien fish, the game constantly surprises me and keeps me occupied with the crafting elements. Galactic Catch is easily my favourite game on Quest 2

developer_response.body:
Thank you Coven.And.Crafts appreciate the shout out.  Don't forget you can craft many items more than once to further customize your aquarium.
- Galactic Catch Team

reviews.review_description:
I am soooo in love with this game so far!! I had no idea I would enjoy it as much as I do. The locations are so vibrant and gorgeous! I cannot wait to unlock more!! And the fish, omg, they are so unique and adorable! The sounds make catching so much more thrilling!! 

Gameplay is smooth as silk. I have played for a few hours now and have not had any issues which is rare upon release! Hats off to the developers!! The controls are familiar as other VR fishing games and you can fish one handed as well.

You collect items with each fish you catch and get rewards for completing mini missions alone your journey in the galaxy. You use these items to craft items like lures to keep advancing. You can decorate and unlock things to personalize your aquarium on your ship to make it one of a kind. 

This is an awesome game for all ages!

developer_response.body: Thank you for the great review!

reviews.review_description:
Galactic Catch is absolutely perfect in every way. From the lush colourful environments to the excitement of what kind of exotic alien species you will land next! It plays incredibly well, the physics make this game stand out from the crowd. You really do feel like you're trying to land a big catch!

I adore the mini missions and crafting elements. Getting to fill the tank on your spaceship is a great touch! It's fun to see all your catches swimming around. And being able to customise it with various backgrounds and objects is really cool. I was getting Flight of the Navigator vibes 😅 I think the narrative is really fun and compliments the characters, the dialogue had me laughing out loud in places. 

I hope you're incredibly proud of what you have accomplished. Galactic Catch has most certainly put you on the VR map as a development studio. I look forward to the future and many more successful titles.

developer_response.body: Thank you and great 80's call out. The game and the Invasion universe were heavily inspired by retro sci-fi from the 1950's and 1960's.

reviews.review_description: My expectations were kinda low for “another” fishing game, but this game is amazing. It fires on so many cylinders. From the detailed sci-if worlds, to the crazy alien fish you catch, and the great mechanics.  Casting feels easy and natural, and landing a fish is really fun and the challenge varies depending on the fish you’ve hooked and the rod, lure, and other power-ups you earn. And it’s great when you are rewarded at the end with a look at your catch. But what blew me away after that was the Sea World sized aquarium, where I could keep all the fish I caught.  It’s really fun and rewarding to build out your multiple aquariums not only with fish, but with decorations you can earn by catching more fish.  The music is cool and relaxing and the fishing itself is challenging but doable so it’s not one of those games that leaves you all stressed out. I haven’t played it all, but between the fishing, the graphics (really good), the collecting, the crafting, the audio, and the increasing complexity of the challenges I’ll keep coming back.

developer_response.body: Thank you for the great and detailed review!

reviews.review_description: Love this game and can’t wait to keep playing.  Awesome graphics,  love the challenges and looking forward to unlocking more spots to fish.

developer_response.body: Thank you for taking the time to write a great review, deeply appreciate it.

reviews.review_description:
What an absolute gem! So relaxing to sit in such picturesque scenery! It’s like being whisked off into a Pixar Movie 😍

Amazing missions to complete, and fishing spots to unlock! Was a great pleasure to start catching the Legendary fish!! 

So many amazing features! Design your own aquarium and decorate with backgrounds and in tank features! Just catch fish and collect items to start your crafting! 

But first master the art of your lures!! And you will open up new worlds! 

Option to fish left or right handed! And single handed reeling it’s got it all. 

Absolutely epic game! These developers are fab! Not surprising they are Emmy-Winning 🤩😎🔥

developer_response.body: Thank you for the great review TomGunnaGetYa!  As you said its all about the lures
